prompt: Create a warm editorial lifestyle photograph of a young adult woman sitting cross-legged in a beige upholstered armchair inside an elegant Parisian-style apartment. She has tousled shoulder-length dark brown hair and wears a loose monochrome linen outfit: exactly 3 visible clothing pieces, a cream camisole with thin straps, an unbuttoned oversized beige linen shirt slipping off one shoulder with rolled sleeves, and high-waisted wide-leg beige linen trousers. Her hands rest relaxed between her knees, posture casual and intimate, looking toward the camera; keep the face area softly obscured or featureless for anonymity. The room has ornate cream wall molding, a tall window or glass door on the right with daylight entering, an antique mantel behind her, a gold-framed mirror above it, and exactly 2 framed artworks visible on or near the mantel: one large black-and-white photograph in a black frame and one smaller dark-framed piece partly hidden. Add a small stack of books or objects on the mantel, muted neutral tones, natural linen texture, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, film-grain realism, and a quiet high-fashion magazine mood. Use vertical 4:5 composition, subject centered, knees in the foreground, warm beige and ivory palette, realistic proportions, no text, no logos, no extra people.
